Restraints in Bed: Other Restraint Bed Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that an other type of restraint in bed was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used less than daily
2=Used Daily
555 P0100E_TRNK_RSTRNT_CHR_CD P0100E_TRNK_RSTRNT_CHR_CD P0100E Physical Restraints in Chair: Trunk Restraint Chair Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that a trunk restraint in a chair was used. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not used
1=Used
